description: Stroll along the harbour or lakeside to enjoy Münster's evening golden hour.

locationInfo.description: The converted industrial harbour is Münster's trendiest evening destination — cafes, art, and waterside views.
safetyTips: Stay on the designated pedestrian areas
Watch children near the water edge
Busy at weekends — allow extra time

description: Relax on the grass with good food and great company in one of Münster's green spaces.
groupSuitability: Perfect for couples, families, and small groups

locationInfo.description: A spacious park in western Münster with wide meadows, ideal for picnics and relaxation.
safetyTips: Avoid areas with bees and wasps near food

description: Cool off on a hot day at one of Münster's outdoor swimming facilities.

locationInfo.description: Münster's main outdoor pool with multiple swimming lanes, slides, and sunbathing areas.
safetyTips: Never swim alone in open water

description: Spike, set, and serve on Münster's sandy beach volleyball courts by the Aasee.

locationInfo.lighting: Open outdoor courts — daylight hours only
locationInfo.description: Official sand courts on the Aasee lakeside, bookable or first-come-first-served in summer.
safetyTips: Bring enough water for the team

description: Fire up the grill in one of Münster's designated BBQ areas for a relaxed outdoor meal.
groupSuitability: Perfect for groups of any size

locationInfo.description: Westpark has designated BBQ zones with bins and benches — arrive early to secure a spot in summer.

description: Spend the day at the award-winning Allwetterzoo Münster — one of Germany's best all-weather zoos.
groupSuitability: Great for families and groups of all sizes

locationInfo.description: A large all-weather zoo with covered walkways — enjoyable rain or shine, with over 300 animal species.
safetyTips: Keep children within sight at all times
